name: soms
description: Smart Office Management System — root dev orchestrator (backend + dashboard + Discord bot)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,discord,telegram -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:bot" "npm run dev:telegram"
